title: Human Embryonic Gonad Dissociation with Trypsin-EDTA
author: Regina Hoo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.66fhhbn

steps.instruction: Samples arrive in hypothermosol solution. The gonad is washed with PBS and dissociated into single-cells following the protocol below.
Fragment the gonads with a scalpel into 2 to 20 pieces per gonad (depending on developmental stage).
Suspend gonadal fragments into a 15 mL tube containing 4 mL of Trypsin-EDTA (0.25%) + DNaseI mix. Volume is depending on tissue size. For small tissues: 750 µL in an eppendorff

Place the tube/s into the incubator at 37 °C for 00:15:00 . Rotate and shake to make sure that the gonadal fragments are uniformly distributed on the wall of the tube. For small tissues: incubate epp at 37 °C : 5 min incubation + up & down pipetting + 5 min incubation + up & down pipetting + 5 min incubation

If there are still fragments of tissue in suspension, incubate for 5-10 more minutes. Otherwise continue to next step. This will avoid unnecessary damage on the already dissociated cells. Take a note if this is the case.
Add 9 mL of complete medium with pen-step. Pipette up and down. For small tissues: add 500 µL up & down pipetting
Filter suspension with a 100 uM filter in 50 ml tube. Top it up with complete medium up 50 ml. For small tissues: Filter suspension in a FACs tub strainer and then transfer it to an eppendorf
Discard the supernatant and suspend the cellular pellet in 1 mL of PBS. Transfer to 1.5 ml eppendorf tube.

OPTIONAL *If pellet is reddish, add RBC lysis buffer and incubate for 10 min at room temperature.. *RBC lysis buffer preparation: Dilute 10X RBC lysis buffer stock with water. After RBC lysis, add 1 ml of PBS and centrifuge 500 g for 5 min. Wash once with PBS 0.04% BSA.
Discard supernatant and re-suspend in 250 ul PBS 0.04% BSA. Adjust volume accordingly depending on cell count. For small tissues: re-suspend in 100 ul PBS 0.04% BSA

Prepare digestion mix A B C 1 Reagents Volume Concentration (stock) 2 Trypsin-EDTA (0.25%) phenol red 4ml (depending on tissue size) 0.25% (1X) 3 DNaseI (0.1mg/ml) 40ul 10mg/ml Prepare complete media: A B C 1 Reagents Final conc. 2 RPMI 445ml 3 FBS 50ml 10% 4 Pen-strep 5ml 1% Prepare final resuspension buffer: A B C 1 Reagents Volume Concentration (stock) 2 PBS 5ml 3 BSA 0.04% 20ul 10%
